libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For version 5.0.0, victools migrated to Jackson 3. Generated tests should import and assert against `tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode` / `tools.jackson.databind.node.*`, not legacy `com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode`; do not add Jackson 2 just to satisfy old imports.

deterministic_setup.reason: Normal usage configures a SchemaGenerator with Swagger2Module; the module POM declares jsonschema-generator as provided, so it is not pulled transitively by the tested module artifact.
The module reads Swagger/OpenAPI 2.x annotations such as @Schema and @ArraySchema, and its POM declares swagger-annotations as provided.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8739 [Automation] javac compile fails for com.github.victools:jsonschema-module-swagger-2:5.0.0; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 4.38.0 tests may fail to compile against 5.0.0 until Jackson imports and any API expectations are updated for Jackson 3.
Keep the generator version aligned with the module version; upstream documentation warns that older jsonschema-generator versions may cause runtime errors with newer modules.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: This artifact is a victools jsonschema-generator module whose POM marks both the core generator and Swagger annotations as provided; meaningful tests need those APIs explicitly on the test classpath.
